_comment: prompt 27 — Path B (Infinity) datasource for the Accounting Statistics dashboard. Created at runtime via POST /api/datasources (parity with the runtime acc_stats Path A dashboard). The X-API-Key VALUE is an OUTBOUND-scoped key for the acc Type B models (acc_ar_360, acc_ap_360, acc_gl_report, acc_receipts_enriched, acc_payments_enriched) — supplied at runtime, NEVER committed. Pair with grafana_acc_pathb.json (the dashboard).
name: ACC Outbound (function)
